title: bean resourse pack
description: player hurt sounds replace with fall guy bean hit sound
body:
# bean resourse pack

tiny resource pack that changes the player hurt sounds to fall guys bean hit sounds

### demo
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8Kb4_UVEVrw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


the 3 sound files used come from fall guys which is owned by like epic games but im sure theyre Okay with that considering i am not profiting off of it
